english: Sanctifying an item will multiply the values of an items modifiers by a random value ranging from 78% to 122% for each modifier. The resulting item will now be Sanctified. Most methods of item crafting and modification cannot be used on Sanctified items.

zh-TW.text: 將物品聖化會使一件物品的詞綴數值乘以 78% 至 122% 的隨機數值，形成聖化物品。 大部分物品製作和改造方法無法用於聖化物品。

english: Efficiency modifiers act as divisors to the stat they modify. For example, 50% increased Reservation Efficiency causes your Reservations to be 67% of their base value, 100% increased Reservation Efficiency causes your Reservations to be 50% of their base value, and so on. Reduced Reservation Efficiency will cause the modified stat to grow larger instead of smaller.

zh-TW.text: 被效率詞綴影響的數值將會除以效率詞綴。例如：增加 50% 的保留效率會使你的保留量變為基礎值的 67%。增加 100% 的保留效率會使你的保留量變為基礎值的 50%。以此類推。若減少保留效率，被效率詞綴影響的數值反而會增加，而非減少。

english: Fire Spells Convert 100% of Fire Damage to Chaos Damage Chaos Damage from Fire Spells Contributes to Flammability and Ignite Magnitudes Ignite inflicted with Fire Spells deals Chaos Damage instead of Fire Damage

zh-TW.text: 火焰法術將 100% 的火焰傷害轉換為混沌傷害 來自火焰法術的混沌傷害會貢獻至易燃和點燃幅度 以火焰法術造成的點燃會造成混沌傷害，而非火焰傷害

english: Invocation Skills instead Trigger Spells every 2 seconds. Invocation Skills cannot gain Energy while Triggering Spells. Invoked Spells consume 50% less Energy.

zh-TW.text: 祈願技能改為每 2 秒觸發法術。祈願技能在觸發法術期間無法獲得能量。祈求的法術消耗 50% 更少能量。

english: Elemental Weakness is a Curse that lowers Elemental Resistances. If not otherwise specified, it lowers Elemental Resistances by 30% and has a duration of 20 seconds.

zh-TW.text: 元素要害是一種會降低元素抗性的詛咒。若沒有特別註明，它會使元素抗性減少 30%，持續時間為 20 秒。

english: Debilitate is a Debuff that inflicts 20% reduced movement speed and 10% reduced damage dealt. Unless specified, Debilitate lasts 1 second.

zh-TW.text: 虛弱是一種減益效果，會減少 20% 移動速度和 10% 造成的傷害。若沒有特別註明，虛弱持續 1 秒。

english: Every Support Gem falls into one or more Categories. Support Gems from the same Category cannot be socketed into the same skill simultaneously, but can be used across multiple skills.

zh-TW.text: 每個輔助寶石都有至少一個類別。相同類別的輔助寶石不能同時被鑲嵌在同一個技能寶石上的插槽，但可以被鑲嵌於其他技能。

english: Added random Modifiers are at least this level or higher, except if a specific Modifier type would be excluded entirely from being able to roll. Currency with a Minimum Modifier Level cannot be used on items with an item level below the Minimum Modifier Level.

zh-TW.text: 被增加的詞綴等級至少為此等級或以上，除非有特定詞綴被完全排除於骰出的範圍之外。你無法對等級低於最小詞綴等級的物品使用擁有最低詞綴等級的通貨。

english: You cannot use this currency on items above this level.

zh-TW.text: 你無法對此等級以上的物品使用此通貨。

english: Heat is gained from using specific Crossbow Skills, and can be either beneficial or detrimental depending on the Skill.

zh-TW.text: 熱能可以透過使用特定的十字弓技能獲得，根據技能不同可能會帶來增益或減益效果。

english: Some Skills create Elemental Infusion Remnants when specific conditions are met. Picking up the Remnant grants you the Infusion for 20 seconds or until it is Consumed by another Skill. You can have up to 3 of each Infusion by default. Skills that can Consume Infusions specifically mention the type(s) of Infusion they can Consume and the benefits for doing so. If a Skill repeats or reoccurs, each of them must Consume an Infusion separately to gain the effect.

zh-TW.text: 有些技能在達成條件後會生成元素灌注的痕跡。拾起痕跡會賦予你灌注效果 20 秒，或是直到被其他技能消耗為止。預設情況下，你每種灌注最多可擁有 3 個。 可消耗灌注的技能會提及其可消耗的灌注種類及效果。如果技能重複或再次發生，它們必須各自消耗一個灌注才能獲得效果。

english: Desecrating an item adds an Unrevealed Desecrated modifier. If modifiers are full then a random modifier is also removed. These modifiers can be revealed at the Well of Souls. Items with Desecrated Modifiers cannot be Desecrated again.

zh-TW.text: 褻瀆一件物品可為其增加一條未揭露的褻瀆詞綴。如果物品的詞綴已滿則會隨機取代其中一條詞綴。這些詞綴可以在靈魂深井揭露。 具有褻瀆詞綴的物品無法再次被褻瀆。

english: This item can be Desecrated using the Preserved Cranium currency item. There is an increasing chance for it to be destroyed each time it is Desecrated.

zh-TW.text: 此物品可使用通貨——保存良好的顱骨進行 褻瀆。物品將有機率被摧毀，且機率隨著被 褻瀆次數而提高。

english: Abyssal Monsters spawned from Abysses steal modifiers from monsters killed near their pit, these modifiers can be upgraded to Abyssal Modifiers. Abyssal Modifiers rarely have a chance to become a more powerful Lichborn Modifier.

zh-TW.text: 從深淵中生成的深淵怪物會偷取在坑洞附近死亡的怪物的詞綴，這些詞綴可以被升級成深淵詞綴。 深淵詞綴有低概率成為更加強大的巫妖詞綴。

english: Abyssal Depths are an underground dungeon sometimes found when completing the final Abyss in the area. The Abyssal Depths contains many Abyssal monsters and all Rare monsters will have an Abyssal Modifier. At the end of the Abyssal Depths is a more powerful Rare with both a Lichborn Modifier and an Abyssal Modifier. Defeating this Rare will unlock valuable chests nearby. The chests at the end of the Abyssal Depths can also drop pieces of Preserved Bone, but also can rarely drop additional exclusive Omens and Lineage Supports. At higher levels the Abyssal Depths can lead to powerful Boss Fights.

zh-TW.text: 無盡深淵是偶爾會在完成區域內的最後一個深淵時發現的一種地下地牢。 無盡深淵中包含多深淵怪物，且所有稀有怪物都有一條深淵詞綴。 在無盡深淵的最後會遭遇一名更加強大、同時持有一條巫妖和深淵詞綴的稀有怪物。擊敗此稀有怪物會解鎖周遭含有豐厚獎勵的寶箱。 無盡深淵最後的寶箱會掉落保存良好的骨頭，同時有低機率掉落額外限定徵兆和族裔輔助寶石。 在高等級的無盡深淵中也有機率通往強大的頭目戰。

english: Marked for Death is a Debuff that causes you to take 50% increased damage.

zh-TW.text: 死亡印記是會使你承受傷害增加 50% 的減益效果。

english: Lineage Supports are powerful and transformative Support Gems which can drop in maps, or come from specific sources like a particular Boss. You may only Socket one copy of any given Lineage Support across all of your Skills at once.

zh-TW.text: 族裔輔助為強力的特殊效果輔助寶石，可在地圖中掉落，或從特定頭目等來源取得。 你同一時間只能在所有技能中鑲嵌一個相同的族裔輔助。

english: Naturally Spawning Monsters are those who are spawned upon entering an area for the first time. Monsters that spawn from Secondary Mechanics like Strongboxes or Expedition do not count as Naturally Spawning.

zh-TW.text: 自然生成的怪物為你首次進入一個區域時生成的怪物。以其他機制如保險箱或探險生成的怪物不計入自然生成的怪物。

english: DNT-UNUSED You gain edict declaration when you disable a mod with The Towering Shadow

zh-TW.text: 你以The Towering Shadow禁用一條詞綴時會獲得戒律聲明

english: The first Gruelling Madness on a target Slows their movement speed by 15%. Each additional Gruelling Madness instead increases the Slowing Potency of Debuffs on the targets by 10%, which affects both the first Gruelling Madness and any other Debuffs that are Slowing the target. A maximum of 10 Gruelling Madness can be inflicted on each target. Targets will lose 1 Gruelling Madness every 2 seconds that passes without more being inflicted.

zh-TW.text: 目標所受到最初的殘忍瘋狂會緩速15%移動速度。 每一層額外的殘忍瘋狂改為增加10%減益效果的緩速強度，其同時會影響最初的殘忍瘋狂和其他緩速目標的減益效果。 每一目標最多可以被施加10層殘忍瘋狂。目標在沒有被施加時每2秒失去1層殘忍瘋狂。

english: Each Faerie Fire Debuff causes Hits against the affected target to Gain 2% of damage as Extra Damage of a random Element. The Debuff lasts 8 seconds, and up to 10 can be applied to each target.

zh-TW.text: 每一層仙靈之火減益都會使受影響目標承受的擊中獲得等同於2%傷害的額外隨機元素傷害。減益持續8秒，且每個目標可以被施加至多10層。

english: Runefather's Challenge is a Debuff which raises the Power of affected targets by 5.

zh-TW.text: 符文之父的挑戰是一個減益效果，使受影響目標的力量提高 5。

english: You can have up to 10,000 Runefather's Boast Buffs. Each Runefather's Boast grants +1 to Armour, +1 to Evasion Rating, and +1 to Stun Threshold. Runefather's Boast does not have a duration, but is lost when you die or change area.

zh-TW.text: 你最多可以擁有 10,000 個符文先祖的自誇增益效果。 每個符文先祖的自誇賦予 +1 護甲、+1 閃避值，以及 +1 暈眩門檻。 符文先祖的自誇沒有持續時間，但當你死亡或切換區域時會消失。

english: Monster Packs in a Union of Souls transfer their soul to another Monster in their Pack when slain, granting the receiving Monsters 6% Toughness, and 2% increased damage.

zh-TW.text: 聚魂中的怪物群在被擊殺後會將他們的靈魂轉移給怪物群中的其他怪物，賦予接收靈魂的怪物 6% 堅韌，以及增加 2% 傷害。

english: While Thaumaturgical Dynamism is active, you passively generate a Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charge once every five seconds. The kind of Charge you generate is determined by the Attribute Requirements of the Skills you have socketed in your Skill Gem sockets. The higher the total Strength Requirement total of your socketed Skill Gems, the more likely you will be to generate an Endurance Charge. Higher total Dexterity Requirement corresponds to a higher chance for Frenzy Charges, and Intelligence to Power Charges.

zh-TW.text: 在奇術活力生效期間，你每五秒會被動地生成暴擊球、狂怒球或耐力球一次。 你生成的能量球種類會因你嵌入技能寶石插槽中的技能之需求能力值而定。你插槽中技能寶石的總力量需求越高，你就越有可能生成一個耐力球。敏捷需求越高則會生成狂怒球，而智慧則是暴擊球。

english: Depending on the type of Armour equipped, Players will have a less Movement Speed penalty applied depending on what Attribute the Armour requires. These penalties only apply to equipped Body Armours and Shields. For Body Armour, pure Strength has a 5% penalty, hybrid Strength and Dexterity or Intelligence has a 4% penalty and pure Dexterity or Intelligence has a 3% penalty. For Shields, pure Strength has a 3% penalty, hybrid Strength and Dexterity or Intelligence has a 1.5% penalty and pure Dexterity or Intelligence has no penalty.

zh-TW.text: 視裝備的護甲類型，玩家會根據該護甲要求的能力值而承受更少的移動速度懲罰。這些懲罰只會套用於裝備中的身體護甲和盾牌。 以身體護甲而言，僅要求力量的護甲會給予 5% 懲罰、同時要求力量和敏捷或智慧的護甲會給予 4% 懲罰，而僅要求敏捷或智慧的護甲會給予 3% 懲罰。 就盾牌而言，僅要求力量的盾牌會給予 3% 懲罰、同時要求力量和敏捷或智慧的盾牌會給予 1.5% 懲罰，而僅要求敏捷或智慧的盾牌不會給予懲罰。

english: Merging Crossbow bolts have fragments that can hit the same target at the same time to combine their damage into a single Hit.

zh-TW.text: 融合十字弓弩箭的碎片可同時擊中同一目標，並將其傷害結合至單次擊中。
平靜的敵人無法造成傷害。

english: Archons are a type of Buff that significantly augment your prowess with a certain type of Skills, such as Elemental Spells or Plant Skills. By default, each Archon Buff lasts 10 seconds. You cannot gain any Archon Buff while you already have one, or during a recovery period after you lose one, which lasts 20 seconds by default.

zh-TW.text: 統治者是一種增益效果，可顯著增強你對某類技能的能力，例如元素法術或植物技能。 預設情況下，每個統治者增益效果持續 10 秒。 當你已擁有統治者增益效果時，或在失去統治者後的恢復期間（預設持續 20 秒），你無法獲得任何統治者增益效果。

english: Ice Archon is a type of Archon Buff. It grants: • 25% more Cold Damage with Spells • Convert 100% of Elemental Damage with Spells to Cold Damage • Cannot deal Non-Cold Damage with Spells • Hits with Spells cause 100% more Freeze Buildup Using a non-instant Attack causes Ice Archon to be removed immediately.

zh-TW.text: 寒冰統治者是一種統治者增益效果。 寒冰統治者賦予： 25% 更多法術寒冰傷害 將 100% 的法術元素傷害轉換為冰冷傷害 法術無法造成非冰冷傷害 法術擊中時造成 100% 更多冰凍累積

english: Flame Archon is a type of Archon Buff. It grants: • 25% more Fire Damage with Spells • Convert 100% of Elemental Damage with Spells to Fire Damage • Cannot deal Non-Fire Damage with Spells • Spells have 100% more Flammability Magnitude Using a non-instant Attack causes Flame Archon to be removed immediately.

zh-TW.text: 火焰統治者是一種統治者增益效果。 火焰統治者賦予： 25% 更多法術火焰傷害 將 100% 的法術元素傷害轉換為火焰傷害 法術無法造成非火焰傷害 法術具有 100% 更多易燃幅度

english: Lightning Archon is a type of Archon Buff. It grants: • 25% more Lightning Damage with Spells • Convert 100% of Elemental Damage with Spells to Lightning Damage • Cannot deal Non-Lightning Damage with Spells • Hits with Spells have 100% more Shock chance Using a non-instant Attack causes Lightning Archon to be removed immediately.

zh-TW.text: 閃電統治者是一種統治者增益效果。 閃電統治者賦予： 25% 更多法術閃電傷害 將 100% 的法術元素傷害轉換為閃電傷害 法術無法造成非閃電傷害 法術擊中有 100% 更多感電機率 使用非即時攻擊會立即移除閃電統治者。

english: Elemental Archon is a type of Archon Buff. It grants: • 25% more Elemental Damage with Spells • Cannot deal Non-Elemental Damage with Spells • Hits with Spells cause 100% more Freeze Buildup • Spells have 100% more Flammability Magnitude • Hits with Spells have 100% more Shock chance Using a non-instant Attack causes Elemental Archon to be removed immediately.

zh-TW.text: 元素統治者是一種統治者增益效果。 元素統治者賦予： 25%更多法術元素傷害 法術無法造成非元素傷害 法術擊中造成 100%更多冰凍累積 法術有100%更多易燃幅度 法術擊中造成 100%更多感電機率

english: Nature's Archon is a type of Archon Buff. It grants: • 25% more Damage with Plant Skills • Plants have a 100% chance to immediately Overgrow • 200% more Skill Effect Duration of Plant Skills • Plant Skills have +2 to Limit

zh-TW.text: 自然統治者是一種統治者增益效果。 自然統治者賦予： 25%更多植物技能傷害 植物有100%機率立即過度生長 200%更多植物技能效果持續時間 植物技能 +2 上限

english: Archon of Undeath is a type of Archon Buff. It grants: • 25% more Minion Damage • 200% more Cooldown Recovery Rate for Command Skills • Temporary Minion Skills have 100% more Limit of Minions summoned When you gain Archon of Undeath all of your Persistent Undead Minions are revived.

zh-TW.text: 亡靈統治者是一種統治者增益效果。 亡靈統治者賦予： 25% 更多召喚物傷害 200% 更多號令技能的冷卻時間恢復率 暫時召喚物技能召喚的召喚物上限提高 100% 當你獲得亡靈統治者時，你所有持續性的不死召喚物都會復活。

english: A Temporary Minion is a Minion that does not revive after it dies.

zh-TW.text: 暫時召喚物是一種不會在死亡後復活的召喚物。

english: Minion Reforming is similar to Minion Reviving, but only occurs at the end of the "Minion Reforming" Buff Timer that is granted while Persistent Minions are dead, as opposed to other effects that may revive Minions.

zh-TW.text: 召喚物重塑與召喚物復甦類似，但只會在持續召喚物死亡時所賦予的「召喚物重塑」增益效果的倒數計時結束時發生，與可能復甦召喚物的其他效果相反。

english: Gigantic Minions have 20% more Maximum Life, 20% more Damage and 20% increased size.

zh-TW.text: 極大的召喚物具有 20% 更多最大生命、20% 更多傷害，並增加 20% 體型

english: Desecrating an item with the Mark of the Abyssal Lord modifier always removes that modifier, replacing it with an Unrevealed Desecrated modifier of a higher tier.

zh-TW.text: 深淵領主印記為一項物品詞綴，在你褻瀆物品時必定移除，並以一個高一階級的未揭露褻瀆詞綴替換之。

english: Riven Armour is a Debuff inflicted by Hits, which stores 5% of the Pre-mitigation Physical Hit damage of the Hit that inflicts it as its Magnitude. The inflicter's subsequent Attack Hits against the target will gain additional unscaleable added Physical Damage equal to that magnitude. Enemies with Riven Armour cannot get their Armour Broken further.

zh-TW.text: 碎甲是一種擊中時造成的減益效果，保存該次擊中 5% 的減免前物理擊中傷害，做為其幅度。 施加者接下來對目標攻擊擊中時，會額外獲得相當於該幅度的獨立附加物理傷害。 受碎甲影響的敵人無法進一步受到破甲。

english: Molten Fissures are long-lasting fissures created by some Slams that can themselves be Slammed to create Aftershocks. Hitting a Molten Fissure with a Slam other than another Molten Fissure causes an Aftershock to propagate along its length, dealing the Fissure's damage again to enemies standing on it. This Aftershock will also spread to other intersecting Molten Fissures. Each Molten Fissure can Aftershock no more than once every 0.2 seconds.

zh-TW.text: 熔岩裂縫為某些重擊後引起餘震的重擊技能所產生、持續時間長的裂縫。 以熔岩裂縫以外的重擊擊中熔岩裂縫時，會在路徑上發散出餘震，對裂縫上的敵人再次造成該裂縫的傷害。該餘震也會擴散至其他交會的熔岩裂縫。每道熔岩裂縫每 0.2 秒才可引起一次餘震。

english: Sands of Time grants 60% increased Skill Speed, scaling down to 1% over 10 seconds, at which point it will then scale back up to 60%. It also grants 1% increased Area of Effect, scaling up to 60% over 10 seconds, at which point it will then scale back down to 1%.

zh-TW.text: 時間之沙賦予增加 60% 技能速度，在 10 秒內遞減至 1%，接著再遞增至 60%；其也賦予增加 1% 效果範圍，在 10 秒內遞增至 60%，接著再遞減至 1%。

english: While affected by Unravelling, your Chaos Damage randomly either also contributes to Freeze buildup, Flammability and Ignite Magnitudes, or Shock chance - changing which it contributes to every two seconds.

zh-TW.text: 受紛亂影響時，你的混沌傷害也會隨機貢獻至 冰凍累積、 易燃及點燃 幅度，或是感電機率，每 2 秒改變一次其貢獻的效果。

english: Totems you place which grant Embankment Auras give a different Aura Buff to Players in range depending on the kind of Totem, as follows: Artillery Ballista grants 20% increased Skill Speed. Siege Ballista grants 25% more Damage against Immobilised Enemies. Mortar Cannon grants 25% of Damage Gained as extra Fire. Shockwave Totem grants 30% increased Area of Effect. Ancestral Warrior Totem grants 40% increased Glory Generation. Dark Effigy grants 40% increased Damage over Time. Spell Totem grants 50% increased Critical Hit Chance.

zh-TW.text: 你設置的圖騰會賦予陣地光環。依據圖騰種類，會給予範圍內玩家不同的光環增益效果： 火砲砲塔賦予增加 20% 技能速度。 攻城炮台賦予增加 25% 對受禁錮敵人的傷害。 迫擊砲所賦予為獲得相當於 15% 傷害的額外火焰傷害。 震波圖騰賦予增加 30% 範圍效果。 先祖戰士圖騰賦予增加 40% 榮耀生成。 黑暗雕像賦予增加 40% 持續傷害。 法術圖騰賦予增加50%暴擊率。

english: Ice Fragments are created by a variety of Skills and Detonate in an Area to deal Cold damage. If a Skill creates multiple Ice Fragments at the same time, only one of them can damage a single enemy. Some skills can interact with Ice Fragments. Unless otherwise specified, each Ice Fragment can only interact with a single Skill use during its lifetime.

zh-TW.text: 寒冰碎片會由多種技能產生，引爆時對一定範圍內造成冰冷傷害。如果一個技能會同時創造複數寒冰碎片，僅有一枚可以對同一名敵人造成傷害。 部分技能可以和寒冰碎片互動。除非特別註明，每個寒冰碎片在效果期間只能與一次技能使用產生互動。

english: Fragments of Divinity are Consumed by certain Skills to grant additional effects. Divine Fragments last 10 seconds.

zh-TW.text: 神性碎片可以被某些特定技能消耗以獲得額外效果。神性碎片持續10秒。

english: Divinity can be spent for skills, similar to Mana. Divinity inherently Regenerates at a rate of 25% per second.

zh-TW.text: 神性可以像魔力一樣消耗來使用技能。 神性本身會以每秒 25% 的速度回復。

english: Broken Stance is a Debuff inflicted by Hits, which stores 10% of the Pre-mitigation Physical Hit damage of the Hit that inflicts it as its Magnitude. The inflicter's subsequent Hits against the target will gain additional unscaleable added Physical Damage equal to that magnitude. Enemies with Broken Stance cannot be Dazed again.

zh-TW.text: 卸防姿態是一種擊中時造成的減益效果，保存該次擊中 10% 的減免前物理擊中傷害，做為其幅度。 施加者接下來對目標攻擊擊中時，會額外獲得相當於該幅度的獨立附加物理傷害。 受卸防姿態影響的敵人無法再次受到目眩。

english: Umbral Souls grant varying Buffs depending on the kind of Skeletal Minion being replaced, as follows - Umbral Souls from: • Skeletal Warriors grant 15% increased Attack Damage. • Skeletal Snipers grant 15% increased Projectile Speed. • Skeletal Clerics grant 30% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate. • Skeletal Arsonists grant 15% increased Area of Effect. • Skeletal Storm Mages grant 25% increased Spell Damage. • Skeletal Frost Mages grant 35% increased maximum Energy Shield. • Skeletal Brutes grant 60% increased Stun buildup. • Skeletal Reavers grant 6% increased Skill Speed.

zh-TW.text: 幽暗之魂會根據被取代的骷髏召喚物種類提供不同的增益效果，具體如下： 幽暗之魂取代: 骷髏戰士：增加 15% 攻擊傷害。 骷髏狙擊手：增加 15% 投射物速度。 骷髏牧師：增加 30% 能量護盾充能率。 骷髏縱火者：增加 15% 範圍效果。 骷髏風暴法師：增加 25% 法術傷害。 骷髏霜寒法師：增加 35% 最大能量護盾。 骷髏巨獸：增加 60% 暈眩累積。 骷髏掠奪者：增加 6% 技能速度。

english: Deadly Map Bosses are specific Powerful Map Bosses that appear in specific Maps and are more difficult and drop better rewards. These rewards are often accompanied by a specific item, usually from a pool of items. For example Unique Items, or Lineage Supports. Deadly Map Bosses can also drop items that grant access to Pinnacle Bosses.

zh-TW.text: 致命地圖頭目屬於一種特殊的強大地圖頭目且只出現在特定地圖中，其具有更高的難度和更好的獎勵。 這些獎勵常伴隨特定物品，往往選自一個物品池，如傳奇物品或族裔輔助。 致命地圖頭目也可能掉落用來挑戰巔峰頭目的物品。

english: Pinnacle Bosses are endgame bosses accessed via specific keys or interactions with their mechanic.

zh-TW.text: 巔峰頭目為透過特定關鍵道具或與機制互動以解鎖的終局頭目。

english: Invocation Skills are Persistent Skills that gain Energy through some condition and can be used once sufficient Energy has been gathered to Invoke socketed Skills, expending the Energy to Trigger them. Invocations can Trigger socketed Skills multiple times if enough Energy is expended, unless otherwise specified.

zh-TW.text: 祈願技能為持續性技能，在某些條件下可獲得能量，在達到足夠能量來祈求插槽中的技能時，可消耗能量觸發。如無另外說明，在有足夠能量可供消耗時，可觸發插槽中的技能多次。

english: Sundered Armour is a Debuff that can be applied to enemies with Fully Broken Armour that increases the Physical damage they take from Hits by an additional 20%. This effect stacks with the target's normal Fully Broken Armour. Unless otherwise specified, modifiers to Fully Broken Armour also apply to Sundered Armour. Enemies with Sundered Armour cannot get their Armour Broken further.

zh-TW.text: 破碎護甲為一種減益效果，可對受到完全破甲效果的敵人施加，使得遭擊中時受到的物理傷害額外增加 20%。該效果可與目標一般的完全破甲效果疊加。 如無另外說明，完全破甲的詞綴也會套用於破碎護甲。擁有破碎護甲的敵人無法再被進一步破甲。

english: A target is Isolated if none of its allies are within 6m of it.

zh-TW.text: 若目標周圍 6 公尺內沒有任何友方，則該目標為孤立狀態。

english: Overflowing Chalice is a buff that causes Life and Mana Flasks to gain 2 charges per second and provide 30% increased recovery.

zh-TW.text: 滿溢聖杯是一個增益效果，使生命和魔力藥劑每秒獲得 2 充能，並提供 30% 增加的恢復量。

english: Withering Ground applies Withered every second to enemies standing in it.

zh-TW.text: 凋零地面會每秒對位於其中的敵人施加凋零。

english: Default Attacks are the innate Attack skills provided by Martial Weapons, and the innate Unarmed Attack skill "Punch". The skill level of your Default Attacks is determined by your character level, and in turn determines the Attack Damage scaling of the skill, which is the percentage of your Weapon's damage the Default Attack deals. Default Attacks never have any cost.

zh-TW.text: 普通攻擊是由軍用武器提供的先天攻擊技能，以及先天的空手攻擊技能「正拳」。 普通攻擊的技能等級取決於角色等級，並進而決定該技能的攻擊傷害調幅，亦即普通攻擊會造成武器傷害的一定百分比。 普通攻擊不會有任何消耗。

english: Your Default Attack Damage is the expected damage of a Default Attack, and is determined by the damage of your Weapon and an Attack Damage scaling value based on your character level. Your Default Attacks will always deal Default Attack Damage unless modifiers are applied to change their damage or skill level. Some Attack skills provided by Support Gems do not determine their Attack Damage scaling from skill level, but instead deal a percentage of Default Attack Damage.

zh-TW.text: 你的普通攻擊傷害為普通攻擊的預期傷害，該數值由你的武器傷害以及隨角色等級變化的攻擊傷害調幅決定。 你的普通攻擊在未受到任何改變其傷害或技能等級之詞綴影響時，始終會造成普通攻擊傷害。 某些由輔助寶石提供的攻擊技能，並不是依據技能等級來決定攻擊傷害調幅，而是造成一定百分比的普通攻擊傷害。

english: Khatal's Rejuvenation stacks up to 8 times and grants 5% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate per stack. Each stack of Khatal's Rejuvenation lasts for 10 seconds.

zh-TW.text: 卡塔爾的回春可以疊加最多8層，每層賦予5%冷卻時間恢復率速度。每一層卡塔爾的回春持續10秒。

english: While you have this Buff, damage you take is stored. When the Buff expires, you gain Guard equal to 50% of the stored damage and Rage equal to 3% of the stored damage.

zh-TW.text: 當你擁有此增益效果時，你會儲存承受的傷害。當增益效果持續時間結束時，你會獲得等同於50%儲存傷害的保護、和3%儲存傷害的盛怒。

english: Two gems are considered Connected if one is socketed into the other, or if both are socketed into a third gem. A Support Gem socketed in a Meta Skill is still Connected to that Meta Skill and to all other Skills socketed in that Meta Skill, even if it cannot Support some of those skills.

zh-TW.text: 兩個寶石被視為連接的情況是：其中一個鑲嵌到另一個之中，或是它們都鑲嵌在同一顆第三寶石之中。 一顆輔助寶石若鑲嵌在主要技能內，依然與該主要技能及鑲嵌在其中的所有其他技能保持連接，即使它無法輔助其中部分技能。

english: Activating a Summoning Circle will cause a Boss to be spawned. If an area contains more than one Summoning Circle it will contain runes to reactivate the Summoning Circle instead of additional Summoning Circles.

zh-TW.text: 觸發召喚法陣會生成頭目。 如果區域中含有多於一個召喚法陣，其會含有可重複啟動召喚法陣的符文，而不是額外的召喚法陣。

english: Adaptations are gained by taking Elemental Damage from Hits and cause you to take less damage of that Type from subsequent Hits. Unless otherwise specified, you can have 3 Adaptations at a time, and Adaptations do not have a duration.

zh-TW.text: 適應是一種會使你從接下來的擊中中根據適應種類而承受更少傷害的增益效果。 除非特別說明，否則你可以同時擁有5層適應，且適應沒有持續時間。

english: Shapeshifting into a Bear grants access to devastating Slams and Fire Attacks fuelled by smouldering Rage. While in Bear form, you gain: • +10 to Armour per level • 30% of Armour also applies to Elemental Damage • an Endurance Charge for every 15 Rage you spend

zh-TW.text: 變形 成巨熊型態能使你能以盛怒驅動自身，並施展毀滅性的重擊和火焰 攻擊 。 當你處於熊型態時，你會獲得： • 每等級 +10 護甲 • 30%的護甲同時套用至元素傷害 • 每消耗 15 盛怒 即獲得一顆耐力球

english: Shapeshift into a Werewolf to draw power from the Cold light of the moon, leading your pack with rabid Attacks. While in Werewolf form, you drop to all fours after moving for a short time, gaining 30% increased movement speed when not Sprinting.

zh-TW.text: 變形 成狼人型態，並從冰冷的月光中汲取力量，引領你的狼群發起狂亂的攻擊。 當你處於狼人型態時，你會在移動後的短時間內改為四足奔跑， 在未衝刺的狀態下增加 30% 移動速度。

english: Shapeshift into a Wyvern to bombard your enemies with Fire and Lightning, then close in for the kill. While in Wyvern form, you gain: • 50% increased Stun Threshold • 50% increased Elemental Ailment Threshold • 50% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge

zh-TW.text: 變形成飛龍型態以利用 火焰和閃電轟炸你的敵人，隨後貼近距離擊殺。 在飛龍型態時，你會獲得： • 增加50%暈眩門檻 • 增加50%元素異常狀態門檻 • 能量護盾更快開始充能速度加快50%

english: Plants created by Plant Skills can be Overgrown to gain power in ways detailed on the Plant Skill. This generally cannot be caused by the Skill that creates the Plants, and requires a different Skill or effect that specifically causes them to Overgrow.

zh-TW.text: 由植物技能所創造的植物可以過度生長，根據植物技能敘述中的方式獲得力量。這通常無法被創造該植物的技能觸發，而需要額外的技能或效果才得以使它們過度生長。

english: Hits which could potentially be a Critical Hit but do not roll a Critical Hit will re-roll Critical Hit chance until they succeed. Hits have 30% less Critical Damage Bonus for each time Critical Hit chance was re-rolled.

zh-TW.text: 可以暴擊但沒有骰出暴擊的擊中會重骰一次暴擊機率直到成功骰出暴擊。 擊中每重骰一次暴擊機率，就會降低30%暴擊傷害加成。

english: For every 2% increased Effectiveness, Monsters gain 2% more Toughness, 1% more Experience granted and 1% more quantity of items dropped.

zh-TW.text: 怪物效用每增加 2%，怪物便獲得 2% 更多堅韌、1% 更多給予的經驗值以及 1% 更多物品掉落數量。

english: 100% more Maximum Rage Regenerate 1 Rage per second per 4 Rage spent Recently No Rage effect

zh-TW.text: 100%更多最大盛怒 近期每消耗4盛怒即每秒回復1盛怒 盛怒沒有效果

english: Unique items may be closely tied to certain cultures as indicated by an icon in their tooltip. These cultures may hold secrets to manipulating these unique items.

zh-TW.text: 傳奇物品可能會與某文化擁有緊密關聯，該文化會以圖標形式顯示於提示框中。這些文化可能擁有能影響這些傳奇物品的秘密。

english: Wind Skills gain additional interactions with other specified Skills, typically Fire Skills.

zh-TW.text: 疾風技能會與其他特定技能產生額外互動，特別是火焰技能。

english: You see what is and what might have been. Reveal a suite of Oracle-only passive tree nodes after Ascending as an Oracle. On taking The Unseen Path Ascendancy Notable, gain the ability to allocate these nodes.

zh-TW.text: 你能看見事物的本質和可能性。在昇華為天啟先知後揭露一系列先知專屬的天賦樹節點。 在配置「未見之道」昇華天賦後，即可選擇這些天賦點。

english: Some modifiers on Runes and Idols are available only to players who have allocated the Shaman's Wisdom of the Maji Ascendancy Notable.

zh-TW.text: 某些符文 和 魔偶的詞綴僅適用於選擇了狂徒薩滿「聖賢智慧」昇華天賦的玩家。

english: An item with a Vaal Siphoner will require a set number of kills to complete. Once complete the tier of a random modifier on the item will be downgraded and all other modifiers will have their numeric values improved. These improved modifier will have their values randomised between their current value and 10% above their maximum value.

zh-TW.text: 擁有瓦爾汲取者的物品匯需求一定數量的擊殺以完成。在完成後，該物品的隨機一條詞綴會降低階級，但其他的詞綴會提升數值。 受到數值提升的詞綴會從原數值和高於最大值10%的數值之間隨機選擇。

english: By default, chance-based stats cap at 100% chance for the result to occur. However, some chances can surpass 100%. In this case, the event for which you have a chance to effect will occur once for each 100% chance for that event you have, and then have a normal percentage chance for it to occur again based on the remaining value. For example, a Surpassing 215% chance for an event to occur will cause the event to occur twice (once for each 100% chance) and have a 15% chance for it to occur a third time.

zh-TW.text: 預設情況下，所有機率類的數值都會在 100% 時達到上限，確保該效果一定發生。然而，有些機率可以超過 100%。當機率超過 100% 時，你所擁有的每一個完整的 100% 都會讓該事件額外發生一次，而剩餘的百分比則會再以一般機率方式決定是否再觸發一次。 舉例而言，若你對某事件擁有 215% 的滿溢機率，該事件會觸發兩次（對應兩個完整的 100%），並額外有 15% 的機率觸發第三次。

english: Thorny Ground deals Spell damage to enemies upon being created, then continues to damage enemies that move over the Ground, no more than twice per second.

zh-TW.text: 荊棘地面會在創造後對敵人造成荊棘傷害， 並持續地對在其中移動的敵人造成傷害。

english: Strike Skills can be made to deal Splash damage when hitting an enemy, causing an additional Hit to other enemies around the one hit by the Strike. The base radius of Splash damage is 1.5 metres.

zh-TW.text: 打擊技能可以在擊中敵人時造成擴散傷害，對被打擊擊中的敵人周遭敵人造成額外一次擊中。 擴散傷害的基礎半徑範圍為1.5公尺。

english: Marks all have a condition that makes them Activate. When a Mark Activates, it will cause an extra effect and then be Consumed.

zh-TW.text: 印記都有使其啟動的條件。 當印記啟動時，它將產生額外效果，然後被消耗。

english: Any mechanic where the calculation of a single Hit would roll Critical Hit Chance more than once is considered to be Rerolling. This includes anything that makes Critical Hit Chance Lucky, Unlucky, Bifurcated, or Inevitable. Sustained Skills using an independent Critical Hit Chance roll for each different time they deal damage is not Rerolling.

zh-TW.text: 任何單次擊中計算會骰取暴擊率超過一次的機制都被視為重骰。這包含任何使暴擊率幸運、不幸、分岔暴擊或絕對暴擊等。 每次造成傷害都使用獨立暴擊率骰取的持續技能不屬於重骰。

english: When Igniting a target which has already been Ignited by the same use of this Skill, the existing Ignite is removed to boost the new Ignite, multiplying its Magnitude by the total number of Ignites compounded this way. Ignites cannot Compound when reflected, or when applied by Oil Ground that has been Ignited. They will neither remove existing Ignite, nor get any boost to Ignite Magnitude.

zh-TW.text: 當點燃一個已經被此技能同一次使用所點燃的目標時，現有的點燃將被移除以增強新的點燃，將其幅度乘以以此方式複合的點燃總數。 點燃在被反射時，或由已被點燃的油性地面施加時，無法進行複合。這些點燃既不會移除現有的點燃，也不會獲得點燃幅度加成。

english: Drenched is a Debuff that causes enemies to be easier to Shock and Freeze.

zh-TW.text: 濕透是一種減益效果，使敵人更容易被感電和冰凍。

english: Storm Skills are long-duration weather-based Skills that have special interactions with other effects.

zh-TW.text: 風暴技能是長時間的氣候類技能，與其他效果有特殊的互動。

english: The maximum value of this modifier is applied to the whole modifier, including the constant part.

zh-TW.text: 此詞綴的最大值套用於整個詞綴，包含固定部分。

english: Storm and Plant Spells deal 50% more damage Storm and Plant Spells have 75% less duration Storm and Plant Spells have 50% less cost

zh-TW.text: 風暴和植物法術造成 50% 更多傷害 風暴和植物法術有 75% 更少持續時間 風暴和植物法術有 50% 更少消耗

english: Energised Crystals are collected by energising Vaal Beacons throughout Wraeclast, and are required to access Atziri's Temple. 6 Energised Crystals are required to power the Temple Console.

zh-TW.text: 在瓦爾克拉斯的各處充能瓦爾烽塔以獲得充能水晶，這些水晶對解鎖阿茲里的神廟來說不可或缺。 神廟主控台需要6顆充能水晶提供動力。 從瓦爾的皇家血脈之中收集聖徽即可儲存更多充能水晶。

english: This refers to the base amount of time to perform an Attack Skill, accounting only for the Attacks per Second value of the relevant Weapon and the percentage of Base Attack Speed listed on the Attack gem.

zh-TW.text: 此指代進行一個攻擊所需的基礎時間，其中僅考慮相關武器的每秒攻擊次數以及攻擊寶石上列出的基礎攻擊速度百分比。

english: Each time you enter the Temple a random selection of rooms are Destabilised, removing them permanently when you next exit. In addition to the randomly selected rooms, some rooms are Destabilised upon completion. Restricted Rooms that are accessible will always destabilise upon exiting the Temple. Defeating the Architect or Atziri causes greater Destabilisation.

zh-TW.text: 每次進入神廟時，都有一組隨機選定的房間會被不穩定化，並在你下次離開時永久移除。 除了隨機選定的房間外，有些房間會在完成後被不穩定化。可進入的限制房間在離開神廟時必定會被不穩定化。 擊敗建築師或阿茲里會造成更大範圍的不穩定化。

english: Restricted Rooms are those that are placed by using Xipocado's Console in the Architect's Chamber

zh-TW.text: 限制房間為透過賽匹卡托的主控台於建築師之室放置的房間

english: Juatalotli's Medallion prevents the next Destabilisation of a Room

zh-TW.text: 瓦爾羅特聖徽能防止下一次房間不穩定

english: Hayoxi's Medallion rerolls a Restricted Room in the Temple

zh-TW.text: 荷霖蔡聖徽能重骰神廟內的限制房間

english: Quipolatl's Medallion Upgrades the Tier of a Room

zh-TW.text: 克特帕托聖徽能提升一間房間的階級

english: Uromoti's Medallion allows you to place a specific Room in the Temple

zh-TW.text: 烏爾摩堤聖徽能在神廟中放置特定房間

english: Xopec's Medallion increases your Maximum Crystal Capacity by 6 (up to 60)

zh-TW.text: 柔派克聖徽能增加6最大水晶容量（最多60）

english: Azcapa's Medallion increases your Maximum Medallion Capacity by 1 (up to 6)

zh-TW.text: 阿茲卡帕聖徽能增加最大聖徽容量（最多6）

english: Estazunti's Medallion allows you to place an additional Restricted Room Card after defeating the Architect

zh-TW.text: 艾斯祖太聖徽能使你在擊敗建築師後放置一個額外限制房間

english: Puhuarte's Medallion allows you to reroll the Room Cards available for placement

zh-TW.text: 普希瓦爾聖徽能重骰可供放置的房間

english: Zantipi's Medallion adds one to the number of random Waystone Modifiers added to your Temple.

zh-TW.text: 善堤比聖徽能為你的神廟增加一條隨機換界石詞綴。

english: Power is provided to connected Paths by Generator rooms. Powered Paths provide Power to adjacent rooms. The Generator rooms are Dynamo, Shrine of Empowerment, Solar Nexus and Infinite Horizon. The Smithy, Synthflesh Lab, Transcendent Barracks and Golem Works rooms can be Upgraded by receiving Power.

zh-TW.text: 電力會由相連的電力房間提供。電力通路會為相鄰的房間提供電力。 電力房間為：發電機房、恩賜神殿、和日耀匯流之間。 鑄造師、合膚實驗室、超凡營房、和魔像工坊可以透過獲取電力來提升房間階級。

english: Limb Modification can be performed by using a Transcension Device. Limb Modification will replace a chosen body part with a modified version, granting you an additional stat. Limb Modifications are lost when you resurrect after dying.

zh-TW.text: 肢體改造可以透過使用超凡裝置來執行。肢體改造會取代選擇的肢體部位，並以改造版本的取代它，使你獲得額外屬性。肢體改造會在你死亡並復活後失去。

english: Medallions are obtained from Atziri's Temple and can be used to modify the Temple in various ways.

zh-TW.text: 聖徽能在阿茲里的神殿之中取得，用於透過多種的方式改造神殿。

english: Modifiers to Ailment Application apply to: Bleeding, Poison and Shock chance Flammability, Freeze and Electrocution Buildup.

zh-TW.text: 異常狀態疊加的詞綴會作用於: 流血、 中毒、和感電機率 易燃、冰凍和觸電累積。

english: Activating Vaal Beacons Energises Crystals allowing access to Atziri's Temple. Within the Vaal Ruins a Vaal architect's console may be activated to allow the manipulation of the Temple before activating a temporal portal to travel back in time to 400 BIC, during the reign of Queen Atziri.

zh-TW.text: 啟動瓦爾烽塔會充能水晶，賦予通往阿茲里神廟的資格。 在瓦爾廢墟中的一座瓦爾建築師主控台將可以被啟用，使你能操縱神廟，隨後開啟一道穿梭時空回到永恆帝國建立400年前的暫時傳送門，以前往阿茲里女王的統治時期。

english: Each Mirror offers a rare item of one of the following base types: • Dusk Ring • Gloam Ring • Penumbra Ring • Tenebrous Ring • Dusk Amulet • Gloam Amulet • Penumbra Amulet • Tenebrous Amulet

zh-TW.text: 每一道鏡子會提供一個擁有下列基底的稀有物品： • 幽暗戒指 • 黃昏戒指 • 半影戒指 • 黑暗戒指 • 幽暗項鍊 • 黃昏項鍊 • 半影項鍊 • 黑暗項鍊

english: Soaring Ground grants 30% increased Evasion Rating, 40% increased damage while on Full Life, and Onslaught to you or Allies standing on it. These effects Linger for 1 second. Soaring Ground has a 6 second base duration unless otherwise specified.

zh-TW.text: 怒號地面會在你或友方站立其中時增加30%閃避值、增加40%滿血時所造成的傷害、和獲得猛攻，這些效果持續1秒。 怒號地面除非有特別標註，否則有6秒的基礎持續時間。

english: Shrines are found with multiple packs of monsters Worshipping the Shrine. Other monsters may be affected by the Shrine's Presence but do not count as Worshippers.

zh-TW.text: 神殿會以被數群怪物膜拜的型態找到。 其他怪物可以被神殿的存在範圍影響，但其將不算做膜拜者。

english: Runic Ward is a last line of protection, absorbing fatal damage instead of your Life. If you take damage that would cause your Life to reach 0 while you have Runic Ward, you will drop to 1 Life and your Runic Ward will take the remaining damage. You will still die if you do not have enough Runic Ward to absorb the remaining damage. Runic Ward does not protect against Life loss that is not caused by taking damage. Runic Ward constantly regenerates at a default rate of 5% per second. Monsters can also have Runic Ward. While a monster has Runic Ward, it cannot be Culled.

zh-TW.text: 符文保護是死亡前的最後一道保障，會代替你的生命承受致死傷害。如果你在擁有符文保護時承受會將你生命歸0的傷害，你將會損失至1點生命並由符文保護承受剩餘的傷害。若你的符文保護不足以承受剩餘的傷害，你仍然會死亡。符文保護不會保護不是由承受傷害所造成的生命失去。 符文保護會以默認每秒5%的速度持續回復。 怪物同時可以擁有符文保護。當怪物擁有符文保護時，其無法被撲殺。

english: Monster Rarity increases the chance for monsters to be Rare and Magic. Monster Rarity also increases Monster Modifier Chance for Rare Monsters.

zh-TW.text: 怪物稀有度會增加怪物為稀有或魔法的機率。 怪物稀有度同時會增加稀有怪物的怪物詞綴機率。

english: Stats that refer to an item's Armour use the exact value listed on the item. This means that Quality and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of Armour actually granted to your character are not considered.

zh-TW.text: 一件物品上標註的具體護甲值。這意味著品質和物品上的區域詞綴會一併納入計算，但來自其他來源、會直接影響你角色所獲得的護甲值將不納入計算。

english: Stats that refer to an item's Evasion use the exact value listed on the item. This means that Quality and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of Evasion actually granted to your character are not considered.

zh-TW.text: 一件物品上標註的具體閃避值。這意味著品質和物品上的區域詞綴會一併納入計算，但來自其他來源、會直接影響你角色所獲得的閃避值將不納入計算。

english: Stats that refer to an item's Energy Shield use the exact value listed on the item. This means that Quality and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of Energy Shield actually granted to your character are not considered.

zh-TW.text: 一件物品上標註的具體能量護盾值。這意味著品質和物品上的區域詞綴會一併納入計算，但來自其他來源、會直接影響你角色所獲得的能量護盾值將不納入計算。

english: Ritual Free Rerolls allow rerolling Favours an additional time at no Cost.

zh-TW.text: 祭祀的免費重骰將允許你不需消耗任何貢禮即可額外重骰恩惠之物一次。

english: Monster Minions are any monsters that are part of a Rare Monster Pack. These monsters receive one modifier from each Rare Monster in the Pack. Monsters summoned or created by other Monsters do not count as Monster Minions.

zh-TW.text: 怪物召喚物為一名稀有怪物群的其餘任意怪物。 這些怪物會獲得來自怪物群中稀有怪物的一條額外詞綴。 由怪物召喚物召喚或創造的其他怪物不被視為怪物召喚物。

english: Rogue Exile Hunting Grounds contain 2 additional Rogue Exiles and 5 additional Packs of Rare Beasts.

zh-TW.text: 盜賊流亡者獵場會包含額外2名盜賊流亡者和5群額外的稀有野獸怪物。

english: Rooms in Atziri's Temple may have their tier upgraded in various ways, up to a default maximum of tier 3. Most rooms are upgraded via their adjacent rooms, some rooms are upgraded via Powered Paths. Garrisons may be transformed into a Legion Barracks when adjacent to a Viper Spymaster or to a Transcendant Barracks when adjacent to a Synthflesh Lab. Flesh Surgeon and Thaumaturge instead have their level equal to the highest adjacent Synthflesh Lab or Sacrificial Chamber, respectively. Quipolatl's Medallion may be used to upgrade the tier of a room by 1.

zh-TW.text: 阿茲里的神廟中的房間可以透過各種方式升級其房間階級，至多提升至階級3。 大部分房間會透過其相鄰房間升級，而某些房間則會透過電力通路升級。 衛兵可透過位於情報師旁升級成軍團營房，又或是位於合膚實驗室旁以升級成超凡營房。 血肉外科醫師的房間等級會等同於相鄰最高等級的合膚實驗室、奇術師的房間等級則會等於相鄰最高等級的獻祭之室。 克特帕托聖徽則可以一間房間的階級提升1級。

english: Additional Rare Monsters can spawn in Rare Monster Packs with larger pack sizes. Each Rare Monster in the Pack provides one modifier to the Pack's Minions. Additional Rare Monsters in Essence Packs also carry Essences.

zh-TW.text: 額外的稀有怪物可以生成擁有更大怪物群大小的稀有怪物群。 每一群中的稀有怪物會賦予一條詞綴至群中的召喚物。 精髓怪物群中的額外稀有怪物也會持有精髓。

english: Empowered Monster Minions deal increased damage and have increased health. Empowerment does not inherently increase rewards but some effects add rewards when Empowering Minions.

zh-TW.text: 強化怪物召喚物會增加造成傷害和生命。 強化效果本身不會增加獎勵，但某些效果會在強化召喚物時增加獎勵。

english: Abandoned Cities have very few living inhabitants. Monsters in the area are replaced by Undead. These undead have 50% chance to drop non-equipment items instead of equipment. Abandoned Cities have 25% increased Chests in the area.

zh-TW.text: 遺棄城市擁有非常少量的存活生命體。 區域中的怪物會被不死怪物取代。這些不死怪物有50%機率使非裝備物品改為掉落裝備。 遺棄城市會增加區域內25%的寶箱數量。

english: Exceptional Items have Quality over maximum or an additional Augment Socket. High Tier Rare Items found have a chance to instead drop as an Exceptional Normal Item.

zh-TW.text: 卓越物品為擁有超過品質上限或額外 增幅槽位的物品。 高等級的稀有物品有一定機率改為掉落為一件卓越普通物品。

english: Protects the Bear Spirit's Allies while they are in its Presence, granting them 2% of maximum Life regenerated per second and causing 8% of the damage they would take to be taken by the Bear Spirit instead.

zh-TW.text: 巨熊之魂守護存在範圍內的友方，賦予他們等同於2%最大生命的每秒生命回復，並使他們承受傷害的8%改為由巨熊之魂承受。

english: Biomes are found throughout Endgame Maps. Grass, Forest, Swamp, Desert, Mountain and Water Biomes are all commonly found. Cities and special biomes are less likely to be encountered.

zh-TW.text: 每個終局地圖中都有自身的生物群系類別。 草原、森林、沼澤、沙漠、山地、和水域生物群系為較為常見的種類。 城塞和特殊生物群系則較為少見。

english: Invaded Cities have their natural inhabitants plus 15 extra Packs of another faction. Invaded Cities gain the Biome bonuses of the invading faction. The Factions are the Ezomyte, Faridun and Vaal.

zh-TW.text: 被入侵的城市會擁有其原先的怪物種類、和15群來自其他勢力的怪物。 被入侵的城市會獲得入侵勢力的生物群系增益。 勢力種類分別為艾茲麥、法里登、和瓦爾。

english: Some methods of item crafting guarantee that a specific Modifier will be crafted onto the item. An item can only have one Crafted Modifier, but they otherwise behave identically to other Modifiers. Crafted Modifiers are displayed in a lighter blue colour than regular Modifiers.

zh-TW.text: 某些物品工藝途徑會保證特定詞綴能被打造至物品上。一件物品僅可以擁有一條工藝詞綴，但除此之外這些詞綴與其他詞綴無異。 工藝詞綴相較於普通詞綴會以亮藍色標示。

english: A Grand Mirror causes a reflection of the Map Boss. When the bosses are defeated Delirium fog spreads to nearby Maps. When the fog reaches 100% Deliriousness one of the remaining maps will be transformed into a Simulacrum.

zh-TW.text: 宏偉之鏡會創造一個地圖頭目的映像，當頭目們被擊敗時會使譫妄迷霧被散播至周遭地圖。 當迷霧的譫妄程度達到100%時，剩餘地圖中的其中1張會被轉化為幻像異界。

english: While you have any amount of Mountain's Teachings: • Attacks you use yourself and Attacks granted by this Ascendancy Class deal 15% more damage • Enemy Hits you take that would deal damage less than or equal to 30% of your maximum Life (after mitigation such as Armour and Resistances, but before other modifiers to damage taken) deal 40% less damage • You have 50% more Stun Threshold All Mountain's Teachings are lost if you go 20 seconds without gaining any.

zh-TW.text: 當你擁有任意數量的山嶺教誨時： • 你使用的攻擊和透過此昇華職業賦予的攻擊造成15%更多傷害 • 會造成小於等於30%你最大生命的敵人擊中（會根據護甲和抗性減免後的數值，但在其餘承受傷害相關詞綴之前）造成40%更少傷害 • 你擁有50%更多暈眩門檻 若超過 20 秒未獲得任何層數，則失去所有山嶺教誨。

english: Wombgifts are found within Breaches and are grown on The Genesis Tree. The 4 types of Wombgifts are: * Lavish Wombgift * Ornate Wombgift * Banded Wombgift * Signet Wombgift

zh-TW.text: 胎贈可以從裂痕中找到，且可於創生之樹上生長。 一共有4種胎贈： * 奢華之胎贈 * 華麗之胎贈 * 捆扎之胎贈 * 圖章之胎贈

english: The Rite of the Nameless is a group of maps which each contain Ritual Altars and a Map Boss. Completing all Ritual Altars will drop an Effigy Piece.

zh-TW.text: 無名之儀是一組地圖，每張地圖各含有四個祭祀神壇和一個地圖頭目。 完成所有祭祀神壇後將掉落一個假人斷片。

english: Effigy Pieces can be placed on an incomplete Effigy in Caer Tarth to complete the Rite of the Nameless.

zh-TW.text: 假人斷片可放置於凱爾塔斯的未完成假人上，以完成無名之儀。

english: You are on Low Runic Ward if you have 35% of your maximum Runic Ward or less.

zh-TW.text: 當你處於35%或更少最大符文保護時，你被視為低符文保護狀態。

english: A Savage Hit is a Hit that removes at least 15% of Maximum Life.

zh-TW.text: 殘暴打擊是指造成至少移除15%最大生命值的擊中。

english: Completing this Map will apply the specified Modifier to other Maps in the Rite of the Nameless.

zh-TW.text: 完成此地圖會施加特定詞綴至無名之儀中的其他地圖。

english: The first list of Favours at Ritual Altars in this Map will contain the specified Item.

zh-TW.text: 此地圖祭祀神壇中的第一個恩惠物品清單會包含特定的物品。

english: Basic Maps are any maps with no special interaction with areas or access requirements. Notably, not Unique Maps, Deadly Map Boss Maps, Precursor Towers, Expedition Areas or Quest Areas.

zh-TW.text: 基礎地圖為和區域間沒有特殊互動、或沒有特定解鎖需求的地圖。 值得注意的是，非傳奇地圖、致命地圖頭目、先行者高塔、探險區域、或任務區域。

english: An item's Base Type refers to the specific variety of item it is, and grants it inherent properties such as damage on Martial Weapons, defensive bonuses on Armour, or Life recovery on Life Flasks. It is also often responsible for the Level and/or Attribute Requirements to equip an item. For example: • Wrapped Quarterstaff and Long Quarterstaff are both Quarterstaff Base Types • Stocky Mitts and Linen Wraps are both Gloves Base Types • Lesser Mana Flask and Greater Mana Flask are both Mana Flask Base Types

zh-TW.text: 一件物品的基底類型指的是它的具體種類，其固有屬性所賦予的特質，例如軍用武器的傷害、護甲的防禦加成、或生命藥劑的生命恢復。基底類型通常也決定了裝備該物品的等級或/和能力值要求。 舉例而言： • 纏繞細杖和加長細杖都是細杖基底 • 結實長手套和麻布裹手都是手套基底 • 低階魔力藥劑和良質魔力藥劑都是魔力藥劑基底

english: There are a number of possible Mage's Legacies, each granting a different bonus: • Legacy of Amethyst • Legacy of Basalt • Legacy of Bismuth • Legacy of Diamond • Legacy of Gold • Legacy of Granite • Legacy of Jade • Legacy of Quicksilver • Legacy of Ruby • Legacy of Sapphire • Legacy of Silver • Legacy of Stibnite • Legacy of Sulphur • Legacy of Topaz Only one instance of each Mage's Legacy can apply its bonus to you at a time.

zh-TW.text: 一共有數種可能的魔遺，每種都會賦予一個不同的加成： • 紫晶之遺 • 堅岩之遺 • 灰岩之遺 • 寶鑽之遺 • 黃金之遺 • 石化之遺 • 翠玉之遺 • 水銀之遺 • 紅玉之遺 • 藍玉之遺 • 真銀之遺 • 迷霧之遺 • 硫磺之遺 • 黃玉之遺 每一種魔遺的加成效果，同一時間只能有一個實例對你生效。

english: Legacy of Amethyst is a Mage's Legacy which grants +45% to Chaos Resistance.

zh-TW.text: 紫晶之遺是一種會賦予+45%混沌抗性的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Basalt is a Mage's Legacy which grants 150% increased Armour.

zh-TW.text: 堅岩之遺是一種會增加150%護甲的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Bismuth is a Mage's Legacy which grants +45% to all Elemental Resistances.

zh-TW.text: 灰岩之遺是一種會賦予+45%全元素抗性的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Diamond is a Mage's Legacy which grants 75% increased Critical Hit Chance.

zh-TW.text: 寶鑽之遺是一種會增加75%暴擊率的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Gold is a Mage's Legacy which grants 45% increased Rarity of Items found.

zh-TW.text: 黃金之遺是一種會增加45%找到物品稀有度的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Granite is a Mage's Legacy which grants +2000 to Armour.

zh-TW.text: 石化之遺是一種會+2000找到護甲的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Jade is a Mage's Legacy which grants +2000 to Evasion Rating.

zh-TW.text: 翠玉之遺是一種會+2000找到閃避的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Quicksilver is a Mage's Legacy which grants 30% increased Movement Speed.

zh-TW.text: 水銀之遺是一種會增加30%移動速度的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Ruby is a Mage's Legacy which grants +60% to Fire Resistance and +5% to Maximum Fire Resistance.

zh-TW.text: 紅玉之遺是一種會+60%火焰抗性和+5%最大火焰抗性的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Sapphire is a Mage's Legacy which grants +60% to Cold Resistance and +5% to Maximum Cold Resistance.

zh-TW.text: 藍玉之遺是一種會+60%冰冷抗性和+5%最大冰冷抗性的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Silver is a Mage's Legacy which grants 30% increased Skill Speed.

zh-TW.text: 真銀之遺是一種會增加30%技能速度的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Stibnite is a Mage's Legacy which grants 150% increased Evasion Rating.

zh-TW.text: 迷霧之遺為一種會增加150%閃避值的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Sulphur is a Mage's Legacy which grants 60% increased Damage, and makes the area within 2.5 metres of you Consecrated Ground while you're stationary.

zh-TW.text: 硫磺之遺是一種會增加60%傷害、且使你於靜止狀態時在你周圍2.5公尺成為奉獻地面的魔遺。

english: Legacy of Topaz is a Mage's Legacy which grants +60% to Lightning Resistance and +5% to Maximum Lightning Resistance.

zh-TW.text: 黃玉之遺是一種會+60%閃電抗性和+5%最大閃電抗性的魔遺。

english: Some Remnant encounters have Bonus Rewards which provide guaranteed rewards, in addition to allowing you to choose a Runeshape Combination. Bonus rewards are granted to all party members who have not previously claimed the reward and were in the area when the Remnant was encountered.

zh-TW.text: 某些遺物遭遇會在允許你選擇符形組合的前提下提供含有固定獎勵的額外獎勵。 所有先前尚未領取、且遺物遭遇時處於區域內的隊伍成員都可以獲得額外獎勵。

english: A Verisium Infusion can be used instead of any of the Elemental Infusions. Skills will prioritise using non-Verisium Infusions. Verisium Infusions last for 20 seconds or until Consumed by another Skill. Your maximum number of Verisium Infusions is equal to the maximum number of any single type of Elemental Infusion you can have (3 by default).

zh-TW.text: 維里西姆灌注是一種特殊的灌注類型，可以替換任意元素灌注使用。技能會優先使用非維里西姆灌注。維里西姆灌注會持續20秒，或是持續至被其他技能消耗為止。 你的最大維里西姆灌注數量等同於你其他任意可擁有的單一元素灌注最大數量（默認為3）。

english: Secured Strongboxes are guarded by additional Packs of Rare Monsters and may roll Modifiers which add Monster Modifiers to any Rares guarding the Strongbox.

zh-TW.text: 嚴密保險箱會被額外稀有怪物群看守，且可以骰出增加看守稀有怪物怪物詞綴的相關詞綴。

english: Slows by 10%, reapplying this Debuff stacks and refreshes it's duration.

zh-TW.text: 減緩10%，重新施加此減益疊層並刷新期持續時間。

english: Each "Boss Encounter" icon on the World Screen is a face which can be broken by beating the encounter. "Rare Monster Encounter" icons do not provide any bonus when broken.

zh-TW.text: 世界地圖上的每一個"頭目遭遇"圖標都是一張臉，可以在擊敗該遭遇後被破壞。 "稀有怪物遭遇"圖標則不會在被破壞時賦予任何增益。

english: Allocated Sinister Jewel Sockets are visible on the left edge of the character portrait in the centre of the passive skill tree. Unique Jewels cannot be socketed in Sinister Jewel Sockets, and modifiers to the effect of Jewel Sockets do not apply to Sinister Jewel Sockets. They are entirely disconnected from the rest of your passive skill tree - they are not considered to be within any radius of any other passive skill, and no passive skill is within any radius of a Sinister Jewel Socket. Multiple Sinister Jewel Sockets are also not within any radius of each other. Radius effects of Jewels will therefore have no effect when socketed in Sinister Sockets.

zh-TW.text: 已配置的不祥珠寶插槽會顯示在角色天賦樹中心、角色肖像的左側邊緣。 傳奇珠寶無法鑲嵌於不祥珠寶插槽中，且影響珠寶插槽效果的詞綴不適用於不祥珠寶插槽。 這些插槽與天賦樹的其他部分完全分隔，它們不被視為處於任何其他天賦點的半徑範圍內，且沒有任何天賦點可處於不祥珠寶插槽的半徑內。多個不祥珠寶插槽之間彼此也不在任何半徑範圍內。 因此，當珠寶鑲嵌在不祥插槽中時，其半徑效果將不會產生任何作用。

english: Socket-bound Augments permanently fill any Augment Socket they are placed into. Once Socketed, they cannot be removed, replaced or extracted by any means.

zh-TW.text: 插槽綁定的增幅會永久佔據其所放置的增幅插槽。 在鑲嵌後，它們將無法以任何方式從被鑲嵌的物品中被取代或取出。

english: Warcries, and Non-Channelling Spells that affect an area around you or a targeted location, are Cascadable. Certain effects can cause Cascadable Skills to Cascade, making them also affect other locations, or to Echo, affecting the same targeted location again after a delay. A Cascadable Spell that Repeats will not Cascade or Echo while Repeating.

zh-TW.text: 戰吼和會影響你周遭或目標區域的非引導法術，視為可爆發。 某些效果會使可爆發技能爆發，使其同時影響其他地點，或是迴響，使其在短暫延遲後再次影響相同地點。 重複的可爆發法術無法在重複時爆發或迴響。

english: Anaemia is a Debuff that allows more than 10 Corrupted Blood debuffs to be applied to a target. The Magnitude of Anaemia determines how many additional Corrupted Blood stacks to be applied.

zh-TW.text: 缺血是一種使目標可被施加超過 10 層腐化之血的減益。缺血的幅度決定了可額外施加的腐化之血層數。

english: Phased Form is a notable Ascendancy Passive Skill granted by Chronomancer granting the following stats: Take 30% less Damage. 4 seconds after being Damaged by an Enemy Hit, take Damage equal to 30% of that Hit's Damage.

zh-TW.text: 迷蹤型態是由時空幻術師賦予的昇華天賦，提供以下數值： 承受30%更少傷害。 在被敵人擊中造成傷害的4秒內，承受等同於該次擊中30%的傷害。

english: The number of Kalguuran Support Gems you can use is limited by your character level: Level 1+: 1 Level 17+: 2 Level 33+: 3 Level 45+: 4 Level 65+: 5 Level 80+: 6

zh-TW.text: 你可使用的卡爾葛輔助寶石數量受角色等級限制： 1 等以上：1 17 等以上：2 33 等以上：3 45 等以上：4 65 等以上：5 80 等以上：6

english: Activating a Precursor Terraformer will change a group of nearby Basic Maps to the shown Biome. The Terraformer shows which biome it will change maps to. All maps in the Terraformed area will be replaced with maps that can appear in the shown biome.

zh-TW.text: 啟動先行者改造器會將相同生物群系中所有相鄰的基礎地圖，轉換為顯示的生物群系。 改造器會顯示它將把地圖更改為哪種生物群系。被改造區域內的所有地圖都將被替換為可在該生物群系中出現的地圖。

english: Ancient Modifiers are fragments of Precursor power, adding many varied bonus effects to areas throughout the Precursor Fortress and beyond.

zh-TW.text: 遠古詞綴是先行者力量的碎片，為先行者要塞及其周邊區域增添各種多樣的額外效果。

english: A mysterious Augment that shifts and shimmers. Is that whispering you hear?

zh-TW.text: 一個神秘的增幅，時隱時現。你聽到了那竊竊私語聲嗎？

english: Sealed Skills are skills which gain Seals. Only skills you use yourself can be Sealed. When you use a Sealed Skill, its Seals are broken, and that use of the skill will gain some benefit based on how many Seals it had.

zh-TW.text: 封印技能是獲得封印的技能。只有你自己使用的技能才能被封印。 當你使用封印技能時，其封印會被破除，該次技能使用將根據封印數量獲得額外效益。

english: Raven-Touched items have been warped by the Raven Trickster, Tangmazu. The influence of the mist allows you to instil the item with a Notable Passive Skill at the Withered Willow. Items that are already instillable will not be able to gain an additional instillment if they become Raven-Touched.

zh-TW.text: 渡鴉所觸的物品已被烏鴉欺詐者湯馬祖所扭曲。 迷霧的影響讓你能夠在凋萎敗柳為物品滴注一個核心天賦。 已可滴注的物品若成為渡鴉所觸狀態，將無法獲得額外的滴注。

english: Great Beasts are Map Bosses marked by Hilda as worthy targets to defeat. Defeating a Great Beast will earn you Hilda's Favour.

zh-TW.text: 巨獸是被希爾妲標記為值得擊敗的地圖頭目。擊敗巨獸將為你贏得希爾妲的恩惠。

english: Hilda will reward you with an Atlas Master point to spend on Atlas Keystones.

zh-TW.text: 希爾妲將給予你一個輿圖大師點數，可用於輿圖關鍵天賦。

english: Temple Currency are currency items found primarily throughout the Temple. These currency items typically interact with Corrupted Items in a variety of ways.

zh-TW.text: 神廟通貨是主要在神廟中找到的通貨物品。 這些通貨物品通常以各種方式與汙染物品互動。

english: Anomaly Maps have added requirements to access on the World Map. Bosses of these maps are Deadly and may drop an additional lineage support.

zh-TW.text: 異常地圖在世界地圖上有額外的進入條件。 這些地圖的頭目為致命等級，且可能掉落額外的族裔輔助寶石。

english: Landmark Areas in the Atlas may be accessed multiple times and do not require a Waystone to access.

zh-TW.text: 輿圖上的地標區域可多次進入，且不需要換界石才能進入。

english: Hiveblood is used to birth Wombgifts from The Genesis Tree in Monastery of the Keepers. The maximum amount of Hiveblood you can have is 100,000.

zh-TW.text: 巢血用於在看守者的修道院的創生之樹中孵化胎贈。 你可以擁有的巢血上限為 100,000。

english: Vivid Spirits are a type of Azmeri Spirit. Monsters Influenced or Possessed by Vivid Spirits gain increased Skill Speed, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type. Monsters Possessed by Vivid Spirits drop Dexterity items.

zh-TW.text: 靈現魂靈是一種阿茲莫里魂靈。 被靈現魂靈影響或附身的怪物在魂靈類型賦予的基礎加成上增加技能速度。 被靈現魂靈附身的怪物會掉落敏捷物品。

english: Wild Spirits are a type of Azmeri Spirit. Monsters Influenced or Possessed by Wild Spirits gain increased Toughness, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type. Monsters Possessed by Wild Spirits drop Strength items.

zh-TW.text: 野性魂靈是一種阿茲莫里魂靈。 被野性魂靈影響或附身的怪物在魂靈類型賦予的基礎加成上增加堅韌。 被野性魂靈附身的怪物會掉落力量物品。

english: Primal Spirits are a type of Azmeri Spirit. Monsters Influenced or Possessed by Primal Spirits deal increased damage, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type. Monsters Possessed by Primal Spirits drop Intelligence items.

zh-TW.text: 原始魂靈是一種阿茲莫里魂靈。 被原始魂靈影響或附身的怪物在魂靈類型賦予的基礎加成上增加造成的傷害。 被原始魂靈附身的怪物會掉落智慧物品。

english: Puppet Master is a stacking Buff which grants: 10% increased Skill Speed with Command Skills 10% reduced Movement Speed Penalty with Command Skills Minions deal 10% increased damage with Command Skills Minions have 2% increased Movement Speed Minions have 3% increased Skill Speed Each stack has an independent duration of 8 seconds. Maximum 5 stacks.

zh-TW.text: 傀儡大師為可堆疊的增益，其提供： 使用號令技能時增加10%技能速度 使用號令技能時減少10%移動速度懲罰 增加10%召喚物使用號令技能時的傷害 召喚物增加2%移動速度 召喚物]增加3%技能速度 每層層數皆有獨立的8秒持續時間。最多5層。

english: Aldur's Legacies are Augments which have taken the power of a Unique Ezomyte or Kalguuran Unique. You may not have more than one Augment of this type socketed at a time.

zh-TW.text: 阿德爾的傳承為吸收了傳奇艾茲麥或卡爾葛物品力量的增幅。你一次最多只能鑲嵌一個此類型的增幅。

english: Corrupted Monsters have an additional Corrupted Modifier. These modifiers may increase the difficulty and reward of the Monster, or may make it easier to defeat.

zh-TW.text: 已污染的怪物擁有一條額外的已汙染詞綴。 這些詞綴有可能會增加怪物的難度和獎勵，但也有可能使其更容易被擊敗。

english: A skill created by Ailith that increases the Effectiveness of Monsters in Breach Hive encounters.

zh-TW.text: 一個在裂痕巢穴遭遇中由艾里絲創造的技能，可增加怪物效用。

english: A skill created by Ailith that creates a zone which upgrades the Rarity of Breach Monsters which enter it. Monsters can only have their Rarity upgraded once, and can not be upgraded beyond Rare.

zh-TW.text: 一個由艾里絲創造的技能，會創造一個領域，使進入其中的裂痕怪物的稀有度提升。 怪物僅能提升一次稀有度，且稀有度無法被提升至稀有以上。

english: Adds an additional Modifier to the area. These modifiers generally add danger and reward. These modifiers will apply for all remaining waves in the Simulacrum.

zh-TW.text: 為區域添加一條額外詞綴。這些詞綴普遍來說會增加難度和獎勵。 這些詞綴會施加至幻像異界的所有剩餘波次。

english: Adds an additional Boss to the encounter. Additional bosses will be summoned into all remaining waves in the Simulacrum.

zh-TW.text: 為遭遇添加一名額外頭目。 額外頭目會在幻像異界的所有剩餘波次中被召喚。

english: Adds additional monster packs to the encounter. Additional monster packs will be added to all remaining waves in the Simulacrum.

zh-TW.text: 為遭遇添加額外怪物群。 額外怪物群會添加至幻像異界的所有剩餘波次。

english: A skill created by Ailith that adds an additional Pack with a Rare Monster to each wave.

zh-TW.text: 一個由艾里絲創造的技能，會為後續的每一波次額外添加一個含有一名稀有怪物的怪物群。
